---
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
toc: false
resources:
  - Thandolwethu_Shakes_Dlamini_Resume.pdf
format:
  html:
    css: resume.css
---

:::: {.portfolio-page}

```{=html}
<div style="text-align: right; margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">
<a href="Thandolwethu_Shakes_Dlamini_Resume.pdf" download style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: var(--accent, #b84c2a); text-decoration: none; border: 1px solid var(--accent, #b84c2a); padding: 0.25rem 0.6rem; border-radius: 4px;">
<i class="fas fa-download" style="font-size: 0.75rem;"></i> PDF
</a>
</div>
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
import yaml
from pathlib import Path

# Load data from single source of truth
data_dir = Path("../assets/content")

with open(data_dir / "work-public.yml") as f:
    work = yaml.safe_load(f)

with open(data_dir / "education.yml") as f:
    education = yaml.safe_load(f)

with open(data_dir / "skill-public.yml") as f:
    skills = yaml.safe_load(f)
```

## {{< var personal.title >}}

::: {.resume-contact}
[{{< var contact.location >}}]{.contact-item}
[[{{< var contact.email >}}](mailto:{{< var contact.email >}})]{.contact-item}
[[LinkedIn]({{< var urls.linkedin_link >}})]{.contact-item}
[[GitHub]({{< var urls.github_link >}})]{.contact-item}
:::

---

{{< var bio.short >}}

---

## Experience

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
for job in work:
    print(f"### {job['title']}")
    print(f"**{job['location']}** | {job['date']} | {job.get('description', '')}")
    print()
    for bullet in job.get('details', []):
        print(f"- {bullet}")
    print()
```

---

## Selected Projects

**AI Systematic Review Pipeline** (2024-Present) -- LangGraph multi-agent pipeline (GPT-4.1 + Claude), 99.3% recall across 6,673 papers at $1.16/review. Co-authored with Johns Hopkins Dept. of Plastic and Reconstructive Surgery, in peer review at *PRS*.

**Qualitative NLP** (2025) -- Privacy-preserving pipeline for on-device open-source LLM qualitative analysis of patient transcripts.

**wipnote** (2024-Present) -- Local-first observability and coordination platform for AI coding agents. HTML files as structured graph storage, SQLite cache, single Go binary. Open source.

**Mercury Transport Modeling** (2020-2022) -- Computational simulation of atmospheric mercury variability and regional inversion modeling. Two papers: one resubmitted to JGR: Atmospheres, one in peer review. International collaboration (MIT, CSIRO, TU Munich).

**TiltHQ** (2025-Present) -- Political media analytics platform in Elixir/Phoenix. OTP supervision tree, Oban background jobs, LiveView dashboard with real-time bias scoring.

**Skhiya** (2025-Present) -- Desktop environment manager (Rust/Tauri + React). Manages .env files, SSH keys, and shell configs across projects.

---

## Technical Skills

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
for category in skills:
    print(f"**{category['title']}:** {category['description']}")
    print()
```

---

## Education

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
for edu in education:
    print(f"### {edu['description']}")
    print(f"**{edu['title']}** | {edu['location']} | {edu['date']}")
    print()
    for detail in edu.get('details', []):
        print(f"- {detail}")
    print()
```

::::
